data.title: First sitting president to have signature on U.S. dollars: Trump's will soon appear on all new notes.
data.description: The current president of the United States, Donald Trump, is soon expected to become the first sitting president to have his signature featured on American currency. This historic move will see Trump's signature on all newly printed U.S. bills, marking a significant change in the appearance of the country's money. This decision will impact all future printed bills, potentially affecting millions of currency notes in circulation.

data.title: William Raveis Signs On To Zillow Preview℠ Expanding Visibility For Pre-market Listings
data.description: A new service called Zillow Preview℠ was recently launched by Zillow in Shelton, Conn., on March 26, 2026. This service aims to increase exposure for pre-market listings, providing agents with the opportunity to enhance visibility for their seller's properties at an earlier stage. Introduced last week, Zillow Preview℠ supports agents in showcasing listings to a wider audience at an early phase of the selling process. Alongside this initiative, William Raveis, a prominent luxury real estate firm, is set to benefit from this service by gaining potential clients looking for premium properties.

data.title: Ghana Forestry Commission and Terraformation Advance Forest Restoration Collaboration to Support Climate Resilience, Jobs, and Social Development
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Accra, Ghana, the Ghana Forestry Commission and Terraformation, a local biodiverse reforestation company, celebrated the continuation of their partnership at a signing event. This collaboration aims to bolster the reforestation efforts in Ghana.

data.title: Trump to be first sitting president to have signature on U.S. dollars.
data.description: The signature of President Trump will be featured on US currency, making him the first sitting president to have this distinction.

data.title: Arcutis Biotherapeutics Shows Market Leadership With Jump To 82 RS Rating
data.description: Arcutis Biotherapeutics has experienced a positive shift in its technical performance, leading to an upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating to 82. This improvement signifies the company's strong market leadership and potential for growth.

data.title: XORTX Announces Results of  Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in Calgary, Alberta, XORTX Therapeutics Inc. shared positive outcomes from its annual and special meeting of shareholders. XORTX, a late-stage clinical pharmaceutical company concentrating on gout and progressive kidney disease treatments, revealed that the meeting took place. The Company's stocks, listed as NASDAQ: XRTX, TSXV: XRTX, and Frankfurt: ANU, demonstrate its commitment to providing innovative therapies.

data.title: Ontario International Airport reports better than 6% passenger gain in February
data.description: Ontario International Airport (ONT) in the Inland Empire had a significant rise in both passenger and cargo traffic in February 2026. The number of passengers utilizing ONT surged by 6.3% during the month, while cargo shipments experienced a robust growth of 10.3% compared to the previous year. This increase in traffic showcases the airport's growing significance as a gateway for the region, emphasizing its role as a key transportation hub.

data.title: Borr Drilling Limited - Filing of 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Borr Drilling Limited, a company listed on NYSE and Euronext Growth Oslo under the ticker BORR, has recently submitted its annual report for the year ending December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This filing was made from Hamilton, Bermuda, as of March 26, 2026. Investors and stakeholders can access detailed financial information and performance metrics in the submitted Form 20-F.

data.title: RH Announces the Appointment of David Stanchak as Chief Real Estate and Transformation Officer
data.description: In Corte Madera, California, RH revealed that David Stanchak is back as Chief Real Estate and Transformation Officer. Stanchak previously led the Global Real Estate Expansion and North American Gallery Transformation from May 2015 to May 2021. data.title: Datacentrex Announces Pricing of $20.17 Million Confidentially Marketed Public Offering at $2.00 per Share
data.description: In Salt Lake City on March 26, 2026, Datacentrex, Inc. (Nasdaq: DTCX), a company specializing in digital infrastructure, has disclosed its pricing for a public offering of common stock and pre-funded warrants. The offering includes shares priced at $2.00 each, which also covers the pre-funded warrant exercise cost. Datacentrex focuses on owning and managing Scrypt compute assets and exploring strategic deals within asset-backed operating businesses.

data.description: STMicroelectronics has released information on the resolutions that will be put forward at the 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting is set to address key decisions surrounding the company's future direction, with a focus on strategic initiatives and financial planning. Shareholders will have the opportunity to vote on important matters including board member appointments, executive compensation packages, and dividend distributions. The meeting is scheduled to take place on [specific date] and anticipates the participation of a large number of stakeholders, with [insert number] shares eligible to vote. STMicroelectronics aims to position itself for continued growth and success through transparent governance and collaboration with its shareholders.

data.title: Unison Announces Securitization of $94.2 Million Unison Home Equity Agreements
data.description: Unison, a prominent player in residential equity sharing agreements, has recently concluded its UNSN 2026-1 securitization in San Francisco. This marks their seventh transaction within Unison’s fund complex. The deal, facilitated through the Unison Midgard Fund, was backed by $94.2 million in assets and obtained an official credit rating from DBRS Morningstar. Noteworthy is the strategic division of the transaction into two investment grade tranches, aimed at optimizing capital efficiency.
